injuries.comment: Sissons did not play in Friday's (Oct. 31) game versus the Avalanche.
The Golden Knights said on Wednesday (Oct. 22) that Hill is week-to-week with a lower-body injury.
The Golden Knights said that Hanifin is OUT for Friday's (Oct. 31) game versus the Avalanche. He still doesn't have a clear timeline to return.
The Red Wings said on Sunday (Oct. 26) that Kane won't travel with the team to St. Louis but hopes to join them at some point on the road trip, per Ansar Khan of MLive.com.
